description: Directions Squeeze a pea-sized amount onto the toothbrush, brush teeth in circular motions for 2 minutes, rinse, and spit. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs.
